---
title: "缺血性心臟病 — Ischemic Heart Disease"
---

## 教學講義 Handouts

- [FFR During STEMI and NSTEMI 教學講義.md](FFR During STEMI and NSTEMI 教學講義.md)
- [FRAME-AMI vs FLOWER-MI 教學講義.md](FRAME-AMI vs FLOWER-MI 教學講義.md)
- [MI Definition Great Debate 心肌梗塞定義之爭議 教學講義.md](MI Definition Great Debate 心肌梗塞定義之爭議 教學講義.md)
- [NEJM CAD Genetics Review 2026 教學講義.md](NEJM CAD Genetics Review 2026 教學講義.md)
- [iMODERN Trial — STEMI 多支血管病變的非罪犯病灶 PCI 時機 教學講義.md](iMODERN Trial — STEMI 多支血管病變的非罪犯病灶 PCI 時機 教學講義.md)

## LaTeX Files

- Eur Heart J 2026-01-21.tex
- JIC Mother-Child Catheter LM Dissection 2018.tex
- NEJM CAD Genetics Review 2026 教學講義.tex
- STEMI_missed_diagnosis_case_study.tex
